elections.note: Numerator = official county 'Final Unofficial Election Night Results' report (Ballots Cast 81,663 of 172,544 registered = 47.33%), which is the END-of-election-night cumulative total (last report of the night; PDF rendered 11/7/2018 11:10 AM), not the strict ~8pm first tranche, so it is an upper bound on the first-report share. Denominator = CA SoS certified final ballots cast (128,353). e-pollbooks not adopted until 2026; ASV never adopted.

Numerator = official county 'Final Unofficial Election Night Results' report (Voters Cast 117,974 of 184,050 registered = 64.10%), timestamped 11/3/2020 11:13 PM; this is the end-of-election-night cumulative total, not the ~8pm first tranche. Independently corroborated by Paso Robles Press/Atascadero News ('As of the close of election night, 117,974 ballots were counted'). Denominator = CA SoS certified final ballots cast (162,615). e-pollbooks not adopted until 2026; ASV never adopted.

Numerator = official county 'Final Unofficial Election Night Results' report (Times/Voters Cast 58,096 of 182,291 registered = 31.87%), the end-of-election-night cumulative total, not the ~8pm first tranche. Denominator = CA SoS certified final ballots cast (121,156). e-pollbooks not adopted until 2026; ASV never adopted.

Numerator = official county 'Final Unofficial Election Night Results' report (Voters Cast 82,548 of 182,606 registered = 45.21%), the end-of-election-night cumulative total (PDF rendered 11/6/2024 12:10 PM), not the ~8pm first tranche. Corroborated by CalCoastNews live coverage ('43% of ballots counted' at 12:40 a.m.). Denominator = CA SoS certified final ballots cast (153,432). e-pollbooks not adopted until 2026; ASV never adopted.
